flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Concorde Career Institute-Jacksonville fell 67% between 2021 and 2024 (678 → 225).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Concorde Career Institute-Jacksonville vs the 2003–2007 baseline (48.5% vs 57.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Concorde Career Institute-Jacksonville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Concorde Career Institute-Jacksonville rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (61.1% → 67.8%).
